evals.prompt: I have hardcoded Color(0xFF6200EE) in my Composable. How should I handle colors properly in a Jetpack Compose app?
evals.expected_output: Define all colors in Color.kt, map them to lightColorScheme/darkColorScheme in Theme.kt. Access colors via MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary — never hardcode hex values.

evals.prompt: How should I define and use typography in Material Design 3 with Jetpack Compose?
evals.expected_output: Define Typography in Type.kt using M3 text style slots. Access via MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge etc. Never use raw fontSize = 16.sp inline.

evals.prompt: How do I support dark mode in my Jetpack Compose app without duplicating all my color definitions?
evals.expected_output: Define lightColorScheme and darkColorScheme in Theme.kt. MaterialTheme detects dark mode automatically. All colors accessed via MaterialTheme.colorScheme update automatically.
